notes: 2026-04-21: Task 9 — No new contributors (all 21 PRs are Repo Assist). Task 10/3 — Implemented text metrics debug example (crates/motif/examples/text_metrics.rs, ~150 lines, zero new deps). Six metric overlays at four font sizes (14/20/32/56pt): baseline (blue), ascent (green), descent (red), cap_height (purple), x_height (orange), underline (gray). Branch: repo-assist/improve-text-metrics-example. PR #56 submitted. Resolves issue #51. Tasks 1/2/6 — nothing to do (no human-authored issues/PRs, no fixable bugs). Task 11 — Updated Monthly Activity Summary. Next priorities: task_5_maintain_prs (2026-04-18), task_3_improvements (2026-04-17), task_7_labels (2026-04-17).

text_metrics_example_pr_2026_04_21.approach: layout_text(text, font_size) → line_metrics()/font_metrics(); overlay 1px quads at baseline/ascent/descent/cap_height/x_height/underline with paint_quad; labels via paint_text. Zero new deps.
text_metrics_example_pr_2026_04_21.notes: Resolves issue #51. Uses only existing TextLayout, DrawContext APIs.

accesskit_integration_2026_03_26.status: COMPLETE PICTURE — all data structures implemented, wiring plan finalized. App struct needs 3 fields: access_tree: AccessTree, focus_mgr: FocusManager, access_context: Option<accesskit_winit::AccessKitWinitContext>. resumed(): init context after window creation with initial TreeUpdate from access_tree.build_initial_update(). window_event(): on each frame, call adapter.update_if_active(|| build_update()); on focus changes call adapter directly. Elements push AccessNode during draw with bounds set. ~30 lines total across examples. accesskit_winit = '0.32' already in Cargo.toml — zero new deps needed.
